notes:
The game runs out of the box but you can't see any characters without using "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" but then the lighting gets busted and the game spams error messages about rendering issues.
The game requires DirectX11 so disabling D3d11 is a no go.
I also tried to run the game on other Proton versions (3.16-4, 3.7-8 and 3.7-8 beta) but it made no difference.
I've played a little without seeing the characters, i made the first quest and explored a bit. The game ran smoothly on low graphics settings, on medium and high there was some lagging.
title: Garden Paws

notes: Only had issues trying to play with high quality setting (would hide the character body and game textures, only showed character eyes and mouth; and sky outside), low and medium seemed to work perfectly fine. I did use the PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%.
title: Garden Paws

notes: It runs, but only on low or medium settings. High settings I get nothing but black textures, medium settings I noticed some graphical issues. When quality is set to low everything seems to work and run fine.
title: Garden Paws

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Literally only disabled clouds in the graphics options once you start up a game and the black texture bug goes away, played an entire day without issues with all other graphics options turned on. There is a minor performance impact compared to windows 10, but its so minor that I'm quite comfortable playing it.
title: Garden Paws
